treePosition: As presented in the workbook, following Sekher — see Sekher's provenance note on how this ordering was inferred.
teachingNotes: Break with the Human Self Image that ties us to our sensual/emotional nature and "human" limitations.
Overcome low self esteem, self hate and identification with past failure.
Resurrect your Divine Self Image which is the supreme agency through which we command all of our Faculties of success.

hekau.text: I am a divine spiritual being endowed with the ability to unite with all.
Since it has been scientifically proven for thousands of years that all things are in unity with each other, I know that my efforts to unite with all is guaranteed.
My selflessness is infinite. I live truth to be the living temple of God. Bring on the tests.
Enmity is the opposite of oneness with all, and therefore with God. All oppositions are genuine opportunities for me to nurture my oneness with God.
Thank you, God for endowing me with the ability to induce peace in my being at will. I rise with peace when others try to bring me down.
I take neither gain, nor loss to heart. Peace is my victory over all opponents.
Man's limitations are well known. Why would I want to go through life with just my talents, and earthly resources. Uniting with God is a no-brainer.
Love is giving, seeking nothing in return. Then beyond count are the ways that I love God.
If in truth I love someone, and God, my divinity will be my gift to them.
